    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "# MODEL ARCHITECTURE\\n",
    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def get_num_groups\(channels, max_groups=32\):\\n",
    "    for g in [max_groups, 16, 8, 4, 2, 1]:\\n",
    "        if channels % g == 0:\\n",
    "            return g\\n",
    "    return 1\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class HybridConv3d\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, in_ch, out_ch\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        mid_ch = out_ch // 2\\n",
    "        self.conv_xy = nn.Conv3d\(in_ch, mid_ch, kernel_size=\(1, 3, 3\), padding=\(0, 1, 1\), bias=False\)\\n",
    "        self.conv_z = nn.Conv3d\(in_ch, out_ch - mid_ch, kernel_size=\(3, 1, 1\), padding=\(1, 0, 0\), bias=False\)\\n",
    "        self.norm = nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(out_ch\), out_ch\)\\n",
    "        self.act = nn.LeakyReLU\(0.01, inplace=True\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        return self.act\(self.norm\(torch.cat\([self.conv_xy\(x\), self.conv_z\(x\)], dim=1\)\)\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class ConvBlock\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, in_ch, out_ch, use_hybrid=False\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        if use_hybrid:\\n",
    "            self.conv = HybridConv3d\(in_ch, out_ch\)\\n",
    "        else:\\n",
    "            self.conv = nn.Sequential\(\\n",
    "                nn.Conv3d\(in_ch, out_ch, 3, padding=1, bias=False\),\\n",
    "                nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(out_ch\), out_ch\),\\n",
    "                nn.LeakyReLU\(0.01, inplace=True\),\\n",
    "            \)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        return self.conv\(x\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class MultiScaleResBlock\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, channels, scales=2, use_hybrid=False\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        self.scales = scales\\n",
    "        self.width = channels // scales\\n",
    "        self.convs = nn.ModuleList\([ConvBlock\(self.width, self.width, use_hybrid=use_hybrid\) for _ in range\(scales - 1\)]\)\\n",
    "        self.norm = nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(channels\), channels\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        splits = torch.chunk\(x, self.scales, dim=1\)\\n",
    "        outputs = [splits[0]]\\n",
    "        for i, conv in enumerate\(self.convs\):\\n",
    "            out = conv\(splits[i + 1] + outputs[-1]\) if i > 0 else conv\(splits[i + 1]\)\\n",
    "            outputs.append\(out\)\\n",
    "        return x + self.norm\(torch.cat\(outputs, dim=1\)\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class AttentionBlock\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, channels, reduction=4\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        self.gap = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool3d\(1\)\\n",
    "        self.fc1 = nn.Linear\(channels, max\(channels // reduction, 8\)\)\\n",
    "        self.fc2 = nn.Linear\(max\(channels // reduction, 8\), channels\)\\n",
    "        self.conv_spatial = nn.Conv3d\(2, 1, kernel_size=7, padding=3, bias=False\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        b, c = x.shape[:2]\\n",
    "        ca = torch.sigmoid\(self.fc2\(F.relu\(self.fc1\(self.gap\(x\).view\(b, c\)\)\)\)\).view\(b, c, 1, 1, 1\)\\n",
    "        x_ca = x * ca\\n",
    "        sa = torch.sigmoid\(self.conv_spatial\(torch.cat\([x_ca.mean\(1, keepdim=True\), x_ca.max\(1, keepdim=True\)[0]], 1\)\)\)\\n",
    "        return x_ca * sa\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class SurfaceRefinementBlock\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, in_ch, out_ch\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        self.edge_conv = nn.Conv3d\(in_ch, in_ch, 3, padding=1, bias=False\)\\n",
    "        self.refine = nn.Sequential\(\\n",
    "            nn.Conv3d\(in_ch * 2, out_ch, 3, padding=1, bias=False\),\\n",
    "            nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(out_ch\), out_ch\),\\n",
    "            nn.LeakyReLU\(0.01, inplace=True\),\\n",
    "            nn.Conv3d\(out_ch, out_ch, 3, padding=1, bias=False\),\\n",
    "            nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(out_ch\), out_ch\),\\n",
    "            nn.LeakyReLU\(0.01, inplace=True\),\\n",
    "        \)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        return self.refine\(torch.cat\([x, torch.abs\(self.edge_conv\(x\)\)], dim=1\)\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class TopoPreservingUNet3D\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, in_ch=1, out_ch=1, features=None, n_blocks=None,\\n",
    "                 use_attention=True, use_hybrid_conv=True, use_surface_refinement=True\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        features = features or [32, 64, 128, 256, 320, 320]\\n",
    "        n_blocks = n_blocks or [1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 6]\\n",
    "        self.features = features\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        self.encoders = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        self.attentions = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        self.pools = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        for i, \(feat, nb\) in enumerate\(zip\(features, n_blocks\)\):\\n",
    "            in_channels = in_ch if i == 0 else features[i-1]\\n",
    "            layers = [ConvBlock\(in_channels, feat, use_hybrid=use_hybrid_conv and i > 0\)]\\n",
    "            layers.extend\([MultiScaleResBlock\(feat, scales=2, use_hybrid=use_hybrid_conv\) for _ in range\(nb\)]\)\\n",
    "            self.encoders.append\(nn.Sequential\(*layers\)\)\\n",
    "            self.attentions.append\(AttentionBlock\(feat\) if use_attention and i >= 2 else nn.Identity\(\)\)\\n",
    "            if i < len\(features\) - 1:\\n",
    "                self.pools.append\(nn.Conv3d\(feat, feat, 2, stride=2\)\)\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        self.ups = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        self.dec_convs = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        for i in range\(len\(features\)-2, -1, -1\):\\n",
    "            self.ups.append\(nn.ConvTranspose3d\(features[i+1], features[i], 2, stride=2\)\)\\n",
    "            if use_surface_refinement and i == 0:\\n",
    "                self.dec_convs.append\(SurfaceRefinementBlock\(features[i]*2, features[i]\)\)\\n",
    "            else:\\n",
    "                self.dec_convs.append\(nn.Sequential\(\\n",
    "                    ConvBlock\(features[i]*2, features[i], use_hybrid=use_hybrid_conv\),\\n",
    "                    MultiScaleResBlock\(features[i], scales=2, use_hybrid=use_hybrid_conv\),\\n",
    "                \)\)\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        self.final = nn.Conv3d\(features[0], out_ch, 1\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        enc_features = []\\n",
    "        for i, \(enc, att\) in enumerate\(zip\(self.encoders, self.attentions\)\):\\n",
    "            x = att\(enc\(x\)\)\\n",
    "            enc_features.append\(x\)\\n",
    "            if i < len\(self.pools\): x = self.pools[i]\(x\)\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        enc_features = enc_features[::-1]\\n",
    "        x = enc_features[0]\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        for i, \(up, dec\) in enumerate\(zip\(self.ups, self.dec_convs\)\):\\n",
    "            x = up\(x\)\\n",
    "            skip = enc_features[i+1]\\n",
    "            if x.shape[2:] != skip.shape[2:]:\\n",
    "                x = F.interpolate\(x, size=skip.shape[2:], mode='trilinear', align_corners=False\)\\n",
    "            x = dec\(torch.cat\([x, skip], dim=1\)\)\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        return self.final\(x\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "print\(\\"Model architecture loaded\\"\)"
   ]

    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "# NORMALIZATION & INFERENCE\\n",
    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def robust_zscore_normalize\(img, lower_pct=0.5, upper_pct=99.5\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Percentile clipping + Z-score normalization.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    p_low, p_high = np.percentile\(img, [lower_pct, upper_pct]\)\\n",
    "    img_clipped = np.clip\(img, p_low, p_high\)\\n",
    "    return \(\(img_clipped - img_clipped.mean\(\)\) / \(img_clipped.std\(\) + 1e-8\)\).astype\(np.float32\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def create_gaussian_weight\(patch_size, sigma=0.125\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"3D Gaussian weighting kernel.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    d, h, w = patch_size\\n",
    "    gz = np.exp\(-0.5 * \(\(np.arange\(d\) - d/2\) / \(d * sigma\)\) ** 2\)\\n",
    "    gy = np.exp\(-0.5 * \(\(np.arange\(h\) - h/2\) / \(h * sigma\)\) ** 2\)\\n",
    "    gx = np.exp\(-0.5 * \(\(np.arange\(w\) - w/2\) / \(w * sigma\)\) ** 2\)\\n",
    "    return \(gz[:, None, None] * gy[None, :, None] * gx[None, None, :]\).astype\(np.float32\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "@torch.no_grad\(\)\\n",
    "def sliding_window_inference\(model, volume, patch_size, overlap=0.5, device='cuda', use_bf16=True\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Sliding window inference with Gaussian weighting.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    model.eval\(\)\\n",
    "    dtype = torch.bfloat16 if use_bf16 else torch.float32\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    D, H, W = volume.shape\\n",
    "    pd, ph, pw = patch_size\\n",
    "    sd, sh, sw = int\(pd * \(1 - overlap\)\), int\(ph * \(1 - overlap\)\), int\(pw * \(1 - overlap\)\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # Pad if needed\\n",
    "    pad_d, pad_h, pad_w = max\(0, pd - D\), max\(0, ph - H\), max\(0, pw - W\)\\n",
    "    if pad_d > 0 or pad_h > 0 or pad_w > 0:\\n",
    "        volume = np.pad\(volume, \(\(0, pad_d\), \(0, pad_h\), \(0, pad_w\)\), mode='reflect'\)\\n",
    "        D, H, W = volume.shape\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    pred_sum = np.zeros\(\(D, H, W\), dtype=np.float32\)\\n",
    "    weight_sum = np.zeros\(\(D, H, W\), dtype=np.float32\)\\n",
    "    gauss = create_gaussian_weight\(patch_size\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # Positions\\n",
    "    z_pos = list\(range\(0, max\(1, D - pd + 1\), sd\)\)\\n",
    "    if z_pos[-1] + pd < D: z_pos.append\(D - pd\)\\n",
    "    y_pos = list\(range\(0, max\(1, H - ph + 1\), sh\)\)\\n",
    "    if y_pos[-1] + ph < H: y_pos.append\(H - ph\)\\n",
    "    x_pos = list\(range\(0, max\(1, W - pw + 1\), sw\)\)\\n",
    "    if x_pos[-1] + pw < W: x_pos.append\(W - pw\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    vol_norm = robust_zscore_normalize\(volume\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    for z in tqdm\(z_pos, desc=\\"Inference\\", leave=False\):\\n",
    "        for y in y_pos:\\n",
    "            for x in x_pos:\\n",
    "                patch = vol_norm[z:z+pd, y:y+ph, x:x+pw]\\n",
    "                inp = torch.from_numpy\(patch[None, None]\).to\(device, dtype=dtype\)\\n",
    "                \\n",
    "                with autocast\(device_type='cuda', dtype=dtype\):\\n",
    "                    prob = torch.sigmoid\(model\(inp\)\).squeeze\(\).float\(\).cpu\(\).numpy\(\)\\n",
    "                \\n",
    "                pred_sum[z:z+pd, y:y+ph, x:x+pw] += prob * gauss\\n",
    "                weight_sum[z:z+pd, y:y+ph, x:x+pw] += gauss\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    pred = pred_sum / np.maximum\(weight_sum, 1e-8\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # Remove padding\\n",
    "    if pad_d > 0: pred = pred[:-pad_d]\\n",
    "    if pad_h > 0: pred = pred[:, :-pad_h]\\n",
    "    if pad_w > 0: pred = pred[:, :, :-pad_w]\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    return pred\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "@torch.no_grad\(\)\\n",
    "def inference_with_tta\(model, volume, patch_size, overlap=0.5, device='cuda', use_bf16=True, tta='flip'\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Inference with test-time augmentation.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    preds = []\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # Original\\n",
    "    preds.append\(sliding_window_inference\(model, volume, patch_size, overlap, device, use_bf16\)\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    if tta in ['flip', 'full']:\\n",
    "        for axis in [0, 1, 2]:\\n",
    "            vol_flip = np.flip\(volume, axis\).copy\(\)\\n",
    "            pred_flip = sliding_window_inference\(model, vol_flip, patch_size, overlap, device, use_bf16\)\\n",
    "            preds.append\(np.flip\(pred_flip, axis\).copy\(\)\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    if tta == 'full':\\n",
    "        for k in [1, 2, 3]:\\n",
    "            vol_rot = np.rot90\(volume, k=k, axes=\(1, 2\)\).copy\(\)\\n",
    "            pred_rot = sliding_window_inference\(model, vol_rot, patch_size, overlap, device, use_bf16\)\\n",
    "            preds.append\(np.rot90\(pred_rot, k=-k, axes=\(1, 2\)\).copy\(\)\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    return np.mean\(preds, axis=0\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "print\(\\"Inference functions loaded\\"\)"
   ]

    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "# POST-PROCESSING\\n",
    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def surface_aware_smoothing\(mask, sigma=0.5\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Smooth surface via signed distance field.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    dist_in = distance_transform_edt\(mask\)\\n",
    "    dist_out = distance_transform_edt\(~mask\)\\n",
    "    sdf = dist_in - dist_out\\n",
    "    sdf_smooth = gaussian_filter\(sdf.astype\(np.float32\), sigma=sigma\)\\n",
    "    return \(sdf_smooth > 0\).astype\(np.uint8\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def slice_wise_hole_fill\(mask, axes=[0, 1, 2]\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Fill holes in 2D slices \(catches tunnels\).\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    filled = mask.copy\(\)\\n",
    "    for axis in axes:\\n",
    "        for i in range\(mask.shape[axis]\):\\n",
    "            if axis == 0:\\n",
    "                filled[i] = binary_fill_holes\(filled[i]\)\\n",
    "            elif axis == 1:\\n",
    "                filled[:, i, :] = binary_fill_holes\(filled[:, i, :]\)\\n",
    "            else:\\n",
    "                filled[:, :, i] = binary_fill_holes\(filled[:, :, i]\)\\n",
    "    return filled\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def fill_small_tunnels\(mask, max_diameter=2\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Fill small tunnels near surface.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    from scipy.ndimage import binary_dilation, binary_erosion\\n",
    "    struct = generate_binary_structure\(3, 1\)\\n",
    "    dilated = binary_dilation\(mask, structure=struct, iterations=max_diameter\)\\n",
    "    closed = binary_erosion\(dilated, structure=struct, iterations=max_diameter\)\\n",
    "    dist = distance_transform_edt\(~mask\)\\n",
    "    near_surface = dist <= max_diameter\\n",
    "    return \(mask | \(closed & near_surface\)\).astype\(np.uint8\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def remove_small_components\(mask, min_size=100\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Remove small connected components.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    struct = generate_binary_structure\(3, 3\)\\n",
    "    labeled, n = label\(mask, structure=struct\)\\n",
    "    if n == 0:\\n",
    "        return mask\\n",
    "    sizes = np.bincount\(labeled.ravel\(\)\)\\n",
    "    small = sizes < min_size\\n",
    "    small[0] = False\\n",
    "    mask_clean = mask.copy\(\)\\n",
    "    mask_clean[small[labeled]] = 0\\n",
    "    return mask_clean\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def count_components\(mask\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Count 26-connected components.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    struct = generate_binary_structure\(3, 3\)\\n",
    "    _, n = label\(mask, structure=struct\)\\n",
    "    return n\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def topology_safe_op\(mask, op_func, **kwargs\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Apply operation, revert if components merge.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    n_before = count_components\(mask\)\\n",
    "    result = op_func\(mask, **kwargs\)\\n",
    "    n_after = count_components\(result\)\\n",
    "    if n_after < n_before:\\n",
    "        print\(f\\"  [REVERT] {op_func.__name__}: {n_before} -> {n_after} components\\"\)\\n",
    "        return mask\\n",
    "    return result\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def postprocess\(pred_prob, threshold=0.5, surface_sigma=0.5, \\n",
    "                min_size=100, max_tunnel=2, verbose=True\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Full post-processing pipeline.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(\\"Post-processing:\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 1. Threshold\\n",
    "    mask = \(pred_prob > threshold\).astype\(np.uint8\)\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(f\\"  1. Threshold: FG={100*mask.mean\(\):.2f}%\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 2. Remove small components\\n",
    "    n1 = count_components\(mask\)\\n",
    "    mask = remove_small_components\(mask, min_size\)\\n",
    "    n2 = count_components\(mask\)\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(f\\"  2. Remove small \(<{min_size}\): {n1} -> {n2} components\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 3. Surface smoothing\\n",

    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "# RLE ENCODING\\n",
    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def rle_encode_3d\(mask\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    Run-length encode a 3D binary mask.\\n",
    "    Returns: string of space-separated start positions and run lengths\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    # Flatten in Fortran order \(column-major\) as per Kaggle convention\\n",
    "    flat = mask.flatten\(order='F'\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # Find run starts and lengths\\n",
    "    if flat.sum\(\) == 0:\\n",
    "        return ''\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # Pad to find transitions\\n",
    "    padded = np.concatenate\([[0], flat, [0]]\)\\n",
    "    transitions = np.diff\(padded\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # Start positions \(1-indexed for Kaggle\)\\n",
    "    starts = np.where\(transitions == 1\)[0] + 1\\n",
    "    ends = np.where\(transitions == -1\)[0] + 1\\n",
    "    lengths = ends - starts\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # Format as string\\n",
    "    rle_pairs = [f\\"{s} {l}\\" for s, l in zip\(starts, lengths\)]\\n",
    "    return ' '.join\(rle_pairs\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def rle_decode_3d\(rle_string, shape\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Decode RLE string to 3D mask.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    if not rle_string or rle_string == '':\\n",
    "        return np.zeros\(shape, dtype=np.uint8\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    values = list\(map\(int, rle_string.split\(\)\)\)\\n",
    "    starts = values[0::2]\\n",
    "    lengths = values[1::2]\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    flat = np.zeros\(np.prod\(shape\), dtype=np.uint8\)\\n",
    "    for start, length in zip\(starts, lengths\):\\n",
    "        flat[start-1:start-1+length] = 1\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    return flat.reshape\(shape, order='F'\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "print\(\\"RLE encoding functions loaded\\"\)"
   ]

    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "# MODEL ARCHITECTURE \(same as training\)\\n",
    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def get_num_groups\(channels, max_groups=32\):\\n",
    "    for g in [max_groups, 16, 8, 4, 2, 1]:\\n",
    "        if channels % g == 0:\\n",
    "            return g\\n",
    "    return 1\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class HybridConv3d\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, in_ch, out_ch\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        mid_ch = out_ch // 2\\n",
    "        self.conv_xy = nn.Conv3d\(in_ch, mid_ch, kernel_size=\(1, 3, 3\), padding=\(0, 1, 1\), bias=False\)\\n",
    "        self.conv_z = nn.Conv3d\(in_ch, out_ch - mid_ch, kernel_size=\(3, 1, 1\), padding=\(1, 0, 0\), bias=False\)\\n",
    "        self.norm = nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(out_ch\), out_ch\)\\n",
    "        self.act = nn.LeakyReLU\(0.01, inplace=True\)\\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        return self.act\(self.norm\(torch.cat\([self.conv_xy\(x\), self.conv_z\(x\)], dim=1\)\)\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class ConvBlock\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, in_ch, out_ch, use_hybrid=False\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        if use_hybrid:\\n",
    "            self.conv = HybridConv3d\(in_ch, out_ch\)\\n",
    "        else:\\n",
    "            self.conv = nn.Sequential\(\\n",
    "                nn.Conv3d\(in_ch, out_ch, 3, padding=1, bias=False\),\\n",
    "                nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(out_ch\), out_ch\),\\n",
    "                nn.LeakyReLU\(0.01, inplace=True\)\)\\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\): return self.conv\(x\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class MultiScaleResBlock\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, channels, scales=2, use_hybrid=False\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        self.scales = scales\\n",
    "        self.width = channels // scales\\n",
    "        self.convs = nn.ModuleList\([ConvBlock\(self.width, self.width, use_hybrid\) for _ in range\(scales-1\)]\)\\n",
    "        self.norm = nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(channels\), channels\)\\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        splits = torch.chunk\(x, self.scales, dim=1\)\\n",
    "        outputs = [splits[0]]\\n",
    "        for i, conv in enumerate\(self.convs\):\\n",
    "            out = conv\(splits[i+1] + outputs[-1]\) if i > 0 else conv\(splits[i+1]\)\\n",
    "            outputs.append\(out\)\\n",
    "        return x + self.norm\(torch.cat\(outputs, dim=1\)\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class AttentionBlock\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, channels, reduction=4\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        self.gap = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool3d\(1\)\\n",
    "        self.fc1 = nn.Linear\(channels, max\(channels // reduction, 8\)\)\\n",
    "        self.fc2 = nn.Linear\(max\(channels // reduction, 8\), channels\)\\n",
    "        self.conv_spatial = nn.Conv3d\(2, 1, kernel_size=7, padding=3, bias=False\)\\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        b, c = x.shape[:2]\\n",
    "        ca = torch.sigmoid\(self.fc2\(F.relu\(self.fc1\(self.gap\(x\).view\(b, c\)\)\)\)\).view\(b, c, 1, 1, 1\)\\n",
    "        x_ca = x * ca\\n",
    "        sa = torch.sigmoid\(self.conv_spatial\(torch.cat\([x_ca.mean\(1, keepdim=True\), x_ca.max\(1, keepdim=True\)[0]], 1\)\)\)\\n",
    "        return x_ca * sa\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class SurfaceRefinementBlock\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, in_ch, out_ch\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        self.edge_conv = nn.Conv3d\(in_ch, in_ch, 3, padding=1, bias=False\)\\n",
    "        self.refine = nn.Sequential\(\\n",
    "            nn.Conv3d\(in_ch * 2, out_ch, 3, padding=1, bias=False\),\\n",
    "            nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(out_ch\), out_ch\),\\n",
    "            nn.LeakyReLU\(0.01, inplace=True\),\\n",
    "            nn.Conv3d\(out_ch, out_ch, 3, padding=1, bias=False\),\\n",
    "            nn.GroupNorm\(get_num_groups\(out_ch\), out_ch\),\\n",
    "            nn.LeakyReLU\(0.01, inplace=True\)\)\\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        return self.refine\(torch.cat\([x, torch.abs\(self.edge_conv\(x\)\)], dim=1\)\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "class TopoPreservingUNet3D\(nn.Module\):\\n",
    "    def __init__\(self, in_ch=1, out_ch=1, features=None, n_blocks=None,\\n",
    "                 use_attention=True, use_hybrid_conv=True, use_surface_refinement=True\):\\n",
    "        super\(\).__init__\(\)\\n",
    "        features = features or [32, 64, 128, 256, 320, 320]\\n",
    "        n_blocks = n_blocks or [1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 6]\\n",
    "        self.features = features\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        self.encoders = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        self.attentions = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        self.pools = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        for i, \(feat, nb\) in enumerate\(zip\(features, n_blocks\)\):\\n",
    "            in_channels = in_ch if i == 0 else features[i-1]\\n",
    "            layers = [ConvBlock\(in_channels, feat, use_hybrid=use_hybrid_conv and i > 0\)]\\n",
    "            layers.extend\([MultiScaleResBlock\(feat, 2, use_hybrid_conv\) for _ in range\(nb\)]\)\\n",
    "            self.encoders.append\(nn.Sequential\(*layers\)\)\\n",
    "            self.attentions.append\(AttentionBlock\(feat\) if use_attention and i >= 2 else nn.Identity\(\)\)\\n",
    "            if i < len\(features\) - 1:\\n",
    "                self.pools.append\(nn.Conv3d\(feat, feat, 2, stride=2\)\)\\n",
    "        \\n",
    "        self.ups = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        self.dec_convs = nn.ModuleList\(\)\\n",
    "        for i in range\(len\(features\)-2, -1, -1\):\\n",
    "            self.ups.append\(nn.ConvTranspose3d\(features[i+1], features[i], 2, stride=2\)\)\\n",
    "            if use_surface_refinement and i == 0:\\n",
    "                self.dec_convs.append\(SurfaceRefinementBlock\(features[i]*2, features[i]\)\)\\n",
    "            else:\\n",
    "                self.dec_convs.append\(nn.Sequential\(\\n",
    "                    ConvBlock\(features[i]*2, features[i], use_hybrid_conv\),\\n",
    "                    MultiScaleResBlock\(features[i], 2, use_hybrid_conv\)\)\)\\n",
    "        self.final = nn.Conv3d\(features[0], out_ch, 1\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    def forward\(self, x\):\\n",
    "        enc_features = []\\n",
    "        for i, \(enc, att\) in enumerate\(zip\(self.encoders, self.attentions\)\):\\n",
    "            x = att\(enc\(x\)\)\\n",
    "            enc_features.append\(x\)\\n",
    "            if i < len\(self.pools\): x = self.pools[i]\(x\)\\n",
    "        enc_features = enc_features[::-1]\\n",
    "        x = enc_features[0]\\n",
    "        for i, \(up, dec\) in enumerate\(zip\(self.ups, self.dec_convs\)\):\\n",
    "            x = up\(x\)\\n",
    "            skip = enc_features[i+1]\\n",
    "            if x.shape[2:] != skip.shape[2:]:\\n",
    "                x = F.interpolate\(x, size=skip.shape[2:], mode='trilinear', align_corners=False\)\\n",
    "            x = dec\(torch.cat\([x, skip], dim=1\)\)\\n",
    "        return self.final\(x\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "print\(\\"Model loaded\\"\)"
   ]

    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "# INFERENCE FUNCTIONS\\n",
    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def robust_zscore_normalize\(img, lower_pct=0.5, upper_pct=99.5\):\\n",
    "    p_low, p_high = np.percentile\(img, [lower_pct, upper_pct]\)\\n",
    "    img_clipped = np.clip\(img, p_low, p_high\)\\n",
    "    return \(\(img_clipped - img_clipped.mean\(\)\) / \(img_clipped.std\(\) + 1e-8\)\).astype\(np.float32\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def create_gaussian_weight\(patch_size, sigma=0.125\):\\n",
    "    d, h, w = patch_size\\n",
    "    gz = np.exp\(-0.5 * \(\(np.arange\(d\) - d/2\) / \(d * sigma\)\) ** 2\)\\n",
    "    gy = np.exp\(-0.5 * \(\(np.arange\(h\) - h/2\) / \(h * sigma\)\) ** 2\)\\n",
    "    gx = np.exp\(-0.5 * \(\(np.arange\(w\) - w/2\) / \(w * sigma\)\) ** 2\)\\n",
    "    return \(gz[:, None, None] * gy[None, :, None] * gx[None, None, :]\).astype\(np.float32\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "@torch.no_grad\(\)\\n",
    "def sliding_window_inference\(model, volume, patch_size, overlap=0.5, device='cuda', use_bf16=True\):\\n",
    "    model.eval\(\)\\n",
    "    dtype = torch.bfloat16 if use_bf16 else torch.float32\\n",
    "    D, H, W = volume.shape\\n",
    "    pd, ph, pw = patch_size\\n",
    "    sd, sh, sw = int\(pd*\(1-overlap\)\), int\(ph*\(1-overlap\)\), int\(pw*\(1-overlap\)\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    pad_d, pad_h, pad_w = max\(0, pd-D\), max\(0, ph-H\), max\(0, pw-W\)\\n",
    "    if pad_d > 0 or pad_h > 0 or pad_w > 0:\\n",
    "        volume = np.pad\(volume, \(\(0,pad_d\),\(0,pad_h\),\(0,pad_w\)\), mode='reflect'\)\\n",
    "        D, H, W = volume.shape\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    pred_sum = np.zeros\(\(D, H, W\), dtype=np.float32\)\\n",
    "    weight_sum = np.zeros\(\(D, H, W\), dtype=np.float32\)\\n",
    "    gauss = create_gaussian_weight\(patch_size\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    z_pos = list\(range\(0, max\(1, D-pd+1\), sd\)\)\\n",
    "    if z_pos[-1] + pd < D: z_pos.append\(D - pd\)\\n",
    "    y_pos = list\(range\(0, max\(1, H-ph+1\), sh\)\)\\n",
    "    if y_pos[-1] + ph < H: y_pos.append\(H - ph\)\\n",
    "    x_pos = list\(range\(0, max\(1, W-pw+1\), sw\)\)\\n",
    "    if x_pos[-1] + pw < W: x_pos.append\(W - pw\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    vol_norm = robust_zscore_normalize\(volume\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    for z in tqdm\(z_pos, desc=\\"Sliding window\\", leave=False\):\\n",
    "        for y in y_pos:\\n",
    "            for x in x_pos:\\n",
    "                patch = vol_norm[z:z+pd, y:y+ph, x:x+pw]\\n",
    "                inp = torch.from_numpy\(patch[None, None]\).to\(device, dtype=dtype\)\\n",
    "                with autocast\(device_type='cuda', dtype=dtype\):\\n",
    "                    prob = torch.sigmoid\(model\(inp\)\).squeeze\(\).float\(\).cpu\(\).numpy\(\)\\n",
    "                pred_sum[z:z+pd, y:y+ph, x:x+pw] += prob * gauss\\n",
    "                weight_sum[z:z+pd, y:y+ph, x:x+pw] += gauss\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    pred = pred_sum / np.maximum\(weight_sum, 1e-8\)\\n",
    "    if pad_d > 0: pred = pred[:-pad_d]\\n",
    "    if pad_h > 0: pred = pred[:, :-pad_h]\\n",
    "    if pad_w > 0: pred = pred[:, :, :-pad_w]\\n",
    "    return pred\\n",
    "\\n",
    "@torch.no_grad\(\)\\n",
    "def inference_with_tta\(model, volume, patch_size, overlap=0.5, device='cuda', use_bf16=True, tta='flip'\):\\n",
    "    preds = [sliding_window_inference\(model, volume, patch_size, overlap, device, use_bf16\)]\\n",
    "    if tta in ['flip', 'full']:\\n",
    "        for axis in [0, 1, 2]:\\n",
    "            vol_flip = np.flip\(volume, axis\).copy\(\)\\n",
    "            pred_flip = sliding_window_inference\(model, vol_flip, patch_size, overlap, device, use_bf16\)\\n",
    "            preds.append\(np.flip\(pred_flip, axis\).copy\(\)\)\\n",
    "    if tta == 'full':\\n",
    "        for k in [1, 2, 3]:\\n",
    "            vol_rot = np.rot90\(volume, k=k, axes=\(1, 2\)\).copy\(\)\\n",
    "            pred_rot = sliding_window_inference\(model, vol_rot, patch_size, overlap, device, use_bf16\)\\n",
    "            preds.append\(np.rot90\(pred_rot, k=-k, axes=\(1, 2\)\).copy\(\)\)\\n",
    "    return np.mean\(preds, axis=0\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "print\(\\"Inference functions loaded\\"\)"

    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "# ADVANCED POST-PROCESSING \(From Discussion Insights\)\\n",
    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def count_components\(mask\):\\n",
    "    struct = generate_binary_structure\(3, 3\)\\n",
    "    _, n = label\(mask, structure=struct\)\\n",
    "    return n\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def remove_small_components\(mask, min_size=100\):\\n",
    "    struct = generate_binary_structure\(3, 3\)\\n",
    "    labeled, n = label\(mask, structure=struct\)\\n",
    "    if n == 0: return mask\\n",
    "    sizes = np.bincount\(labeled.ravel\(\)\)\\n",
    "    small = sizes < min_size\\n",
    "    small[0] = False\\n",
    "    result = mask.copy\(\)\\n",
    "    result[small[labeled]] = 0\\n",
    "    return result\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def surface_smoothing\(mask, sigma=0.5\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"SDF-based surface smoothing.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    dist_in = distance_transform_edt\(mask\)\\n",
    "    dist_out = distance_transform_edt\(~mask\)\\n",
    "    sdf = gaussian_filter\(\(dist_in - dist_out\).astype\(np.float32\), sigma=sigma\)\\n",
    "    return \(sdf > 0\).astype\(np.uint8\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def slice_wise_hole_fill\(mask\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Fill holes in 2D slices \(catches tunnels\).\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    filled = mask.copy\(\)\\n",
    "    for axis in [0, 1, 2]:\\n",
    "        for i in range\(mask.shape[axis]\):\\n",
    "            if axis == 0:\\n",
    "                filled[i] = binary_fill_holes\(filled[i]\)\\n",
    "            elif axis == 1:\\n",
    "                filled[:, i, :] = binary_fill_holes\(filled[:, i, :]\)\\n",
    "            else:\\n",
    "                filled[:, :, i] = binary_fill_holes\(filled[:, :, i]\)\\n",
    "    return filled\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def skeletonize_2d_slicewise\(mask\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"2D slicewise skeletonization \(Host recommended\).\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    skeleton = np.zeros_like\(mask, dtype=np.uint8\)\\n",
    "    for i in range\(mask.shape[0]\):\\n",
    "        skeleton[i] = skeletonize\(mask[i] > 0\).astype\(np.uint8\)\\n",
    "    return skeleton\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def detect_endpoints\(skeleton\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Detect endpoints \(voxels with 1 neighbor\).\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    kernel = np.ones\(\(3, 3, 3\), dtype=np.int32\)\\n",
    "    kernel[1, 1, 1] = 0\\n",
    "    neighbors = ndimage.convolve\(skeleton.astype\(np.int32\), kernel, mode='constant'\)\\n",
    "    return \(\(skeleton > 0\) & \(neighbors == 1\)\).astype\(np.uint8\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def find_endpoint_pairs\(endpoints, max_distance=20\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Find pairs of endpoints to connect.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    coords = np.argwhere\(endpoints > 0\)\\n",
    "    if len\(coords\) < 2: return []\\n",
    "    pairs, used = [], set\(\)\\n",
    "    for i, c1 in enumerate\(coords\):\\n",
    "        if i in used: continue\\n",
    "        min_dist, best_j = float\('inf'\), -1\\n",
    "        for j, c2 in enumerate\(coords\):\\n",
    "            if j <= i or j in used: continue\\n",
    "            dist = np.linalg.norm\(c1 - c2\)\\n",
    "            if dist < min_dist and dist < max_distance:\\n",
    "                min_dist, best_j = dist, j\\n",
    "        if best_j >= 0:\\n",
    "            pairs.append\(\(tuple\(c1\), tuple\(coords[best_j]\)\)\)\\n",
    "            used.update\([i, best_j]\)\\n",
    "    return pairs\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def trace_path\(prob_map, start, end\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Trace path between two points following high probability.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    path = [start]\\n",
    "    current = np.array\(start, dtype=np.float32\)\\n",
    "    target = np.array\(end, dtype=np.float32\)\\n",
    "    max_steps = int\(np.linalg.norm\(target - current\) * 3\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    for _ in range\(max_steps\):\\n",
    "        if np.linalg.norm\(current - target\) < 2:\\n",
    "            path.append\(tuple\(target.astype\(int\)\)\)\\n",
    "            break\\n",
    "        direction = \(target - current\) / \(np.linalg.norm\(target - current\) + 1e-8\)\\n",
    "        best_next = current + direction\\n",
    "        best_prob = -1\\n",
    "        for offset in np.random.randn\(5, 3\) * 0.5:\\n",
    "            cand = np.clip\(current + direction + offset, 0, np.array\(prob_map.shape\) - 1\)\\n",
    "            try:\\n",
    "                prob = prob_map[int\(cand[0]\), int\(cand[1]\), int\(cand[2]\)]\\n",
    "                if prob > best_prob:\\n",
    "                    best_prob, best_next = prob, cand\\n",
    "            except: continue\\n",
    "        current = best_next\\n",
    "        path.append\(tuple\(current.astype\(int\)\)\)\\n",
    "    return path\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def fill_holes_by_tracing\(mask, prob_map, max_gap=15\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Fill holes by tracing between endpoints \(hengck23's approach\).\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    skeleton = skeletonize_2d_slicewise\(mask\)\\n",
    "    endpoints = detect_endpoints\(skeleton\)\\n",
    "    pairs = find_endpoint_pairs\(endpoints, max_distance=max_gap\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    filled = mask.copy\(\)\\n",
    "    for start, end in pairs:\\n",

    "        for z, y, x in path:\\n",
    "            try:\\n",
    "                filled[max\(0,z-1\):z+2, max\(0,y-1\):y+2, max\(0,x-1\):x+2] = 1\\n",
    "            except: continue\\n",
    "    return filled\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def frangi_enhance\(mask, sigmas=range\(1, 3\)\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Enhance sheet-like structures with Frangi filter.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    dist = distance_transform_edt\(mask\)\\n",
    "    dist_blur = gaussian_filter\(dist, sigma=1.0\)\\n",
    "    if dist_blur.max\(\) > 0:\\n",
    "        dist_norm = dist_blur / dist_blur.max\(\)\\n",
    "    else:\\n",
    "        return mask\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    result = np.zeros_like\(mask, dtype=np.float32\)\\n",
    "    for i in range\(mask.shape[0]\):\\n",
    "        try:\\n",
    "            result[i] = frangi\(dist_norm[i].astype\(np.float32\), sigmas=sigmas, black_ridges=False\)\\n",
    "        except:\\n",
    "            result[i] = dist_norm[i]\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    thresh = 0.1 * result.max\(\) if result.max\(\) > 0 else 0.5\\n",
    "    return \(mask | \(result > thresh\)\).astype\(np.uint8\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def topology_safe_op\(mask, op_func, **kwargs\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Apply operation, revert if components merge.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    n_before = count_components\(mask\)\\n",
    "    result = op_func\(mask, **kwargs\)\\n",
    "    n_after = count_components\(result\)\\n",
    "    if n_after < n_before:\\n",
    "        print\(f\\"  [REVERT] {op_func.__name__}: {n_before}->{n_after}\\"\)\\n",
    "        return mask\\n",
    "    return result\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def advanced_postprocess\(pred_prob, threshold=0.5, use_frangi=True, use_hole_tracing=True,\\n",
    "                         min_size=100, surface_sigma=0.5, max_gap=15, verbose=True\):\\n",
    "    \\"\\"\\"Full advanced post-processing pipeline.\\"\\"\\"\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(\\"Advanced Post-processing:\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 1. Threshold\\n",
    "    mask = \(pred_prob > threshold\).astype\(np.uint8\)\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(f\\"  1. Threshold: FG={100*mask.mean\(\):.2f}%\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 2. Remove small components\\n",
    "    n1 = count_components\(mask\)\\n",
    "    mask = remove_small_components\(mask, min_size\)\\n",
    "    n2 = count_components\(mask\)\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(f\\"  2. Remove small: {n1}->{n2} components\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 3. Frangi enhancement\\n",
    "    if use_frangi:\\n",
    "        try:\\n",
    "            mask = frangi_enhance\(mask\)\\n",
    "            if verbose: print\(f\\"  3. Frangi enhance: FG={100*mask.mean\(\):.2f}%\\"\)\\n",
    "        except Exception as e:\\n",
    "            if verbose: print\(f\\"  3. Frangi skipped: {e}\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 4. Surface smoothing\\n",
    "    mask = surface_smoothing\(mask, sigma=surface_sigma\)\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(f\\"  4. Surface smooth: FG={100*mask.mean\(\):.2f}%\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 5. Slice-wise hole fill\\n",
    "    mask = topology_safe_op\(mask, slice_wise_hole_fill\)\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(f\\"  5. Hole fill: FG={100*mask.mean\(\):.2f}%\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 6. Endpoint-based hole tracing\\n",
    "    if use_hole_tracing:\\n",
    "        try:\\n",
    "            mask = fill_holes_by_tracing\(mask, pred_prob, max_gap=max_gap\)\\n",
    "            if verbose: print\(f\\"  6. Hole tracing: FG={100*mask.mean\(\):.2f}%\\"\)\\n",
    "        except Exception as e:\\n",
    "            if verbose: print\(f\\"  6. Hole tracing skipped: {e}\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    # 7. Final cleanup\\n",
    "    mask = remove_small_components\(mask, min_size\)\\n",
    "    n_final = count_components\(mask\)\\n",
    "    if verbose: print\(f\\"  7. Final: {n_final} components, FG={100*mask.mean\(\):.2f}%\\"\)\\n",
    "    \\n",
    "    return mask\\n",
    "\\n",
    "print\(\\"Advanced post-processing loaded\\"\)"

    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "# RLE ENCODING\\n",
    "# =============================================================================\\n",
    "\\n",
    "def rle_encode_3d\(mask\):\\n",
    "    flat = mask.flatten\(order='F'\)\\n",
    "    if flat.sum\(\) == 0: return ''\\n",
    "    padded = np.concatenate\([[0], flat, [0]]\)\\n",
    "    transitions = np.diff\(padded\)\\n",
    "    starts = np.where\(transitions == 1\)[0] + 1\\n",
    "    ends = np.where\(transitions == -1\)[0] + 1\\n",
    "    lengths = ends - starts\\n",
    "    return ' '.join\([f\\"{s} {l}\\" for s, l in zip\(starts, lengths\)]\)\\n",
    "\\n",
    "print\(\\"RLE encoding loaded\\"\)"
